entry.title: Re: How to send control recipe to CPI (Cloud Platform Int...
entry.content: Yes, we know and I am asking if anyone has any experience in doing these modifications, because not sending data to the MES system is not an option.

entry.title: F110: One vendor, multiple currencies – how to use different payees per currency?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts 👋

I’m currently working on a payment run configuration for one of our vendors who operates with multiple currencies (IDR and USD) under a single vendor code (BP).
🧾 Business Scenario:

We have a single vendor (e.g., Vendor 123456) in BP that transacts in both IDR and USD.

The vendor has two different bank accounts, one for each currency:

IDR → Bank account A

USD → Bank account B

In BP master data, we maintained different payee bank accounts per currency under Vendor → Payment Transactions → Bank Details.

⚙️ What We’ve Done:

We posted AP invoices (FB60) under the same vendor, but in different currencies.

During payment run (F110), we split the proposal into multiple line items with different bank accounts, hoping SAP would select the correct bank account based on the invoice currency.

However, SAP still uses the same payee (and sometimes the same bank) for both currencies — it doesn’t switch payee/bank based on currency.

❗ What We Need:

We want SAP F110 to automatically select the correct bank account/payee based on the invoice currency, even if it's under the same vendor (BP).

For example:

Invoice in IDR → payment should go to IDR bank account

Invoice in USD → payment should go to USD bank account

But in our tests, the system only applies one payee regardless of invoice currency.
❓ Our Questions:

Can F110 differentiate payee bank accounts by currency under the same vendor?

Is there a standard configuration or workaround to handle this without splitting vendors?

Is the behavior we're seeing standard (only 1 payee per vendor), and if so, what’s the best practice for this multi-currency + multi-bank scenario?

📌 Notes:

We tried maintaining partner bank type (BVTYP), but it doesn't help when both invoices (IDR & USD) are under the same vendor.

We prefer not to split vendor master per currency unless necessary.

Thank you very much in advance for any help, suggestions, or confirmation!

entry.title: Re: CA02 - mass update when more than one Alt BOM

entry.title: Re: Retention period for tasks completed in Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: If there any documents about S/4HANA Material Master Data model(with table/fields lists)?
entry.content: The note 382318 - FAQ | Function module RFC_READ_TABLE is about the RFC_READ_TABLE function not about MM data model.

entry.title: Re: need help connecting Salesforce to SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
And what happens at runtime?

  • Use alert messages to display the error or other info that would help diagnose.
  • When running the call, open the developer tools and make sure the request -- URL and payload -- is being sent as you expected.

entry.title: PO delivery costs are not take correctly for creating Transport shipment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

My client want to create one single transport for two Purchase orders.

But after creating  Shipment ,one PO does not show any delivery costs ,where as for  another PO it shows correctly.

Please see attached screenshot where two PO are visible.

Please can someone guide how to resolve this so that delivery costs are seen correctly for both POs.

Thank you very much.

BR

SAP SCM

entry.title: Re: If there any documents about S/4HANA Material Master...
entry.content:
Hello @Yuanli06 

The official S/4HANA data model is available as Virtual Data Model and CDS Views in SAP S/4HANA. Material master data is represented with CDS Views for Product Master

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Destination to s4 Public Cloud Gives error wh...
entry.content:
I suspect the authentication is not working well.
When its authentication fails, the S/4HANA backend system returns error messages with HTML format and that would be be parsed in the caller system.
And then, what you may need to check fist would be about the authentication settings.

entry.title: Re: Retention period for tasks completed in Build Process Automation
entry.content: @Dan_Wroblewski It is the instance of Build Process Automation with a status of Completed that is no longer seeing the old one. Will it continue to remain without being deleted even if the status is Completed? Kind regards.

Thank you in advance for your comprehension.

Best regards,

Jeremy

is there a difference in configuration regarding SAP Gateway stand-alone scenarios? Do we need to change system alias? 

After the setup it seems that the tile is trying to evoke ME42 on SAP front-end rather than SAP back-end system.

entry.title: Re: I want create delivery, the STO has 4 line items. I w...
entry.content:
Hello @Priyanka19Komanduri 

Consider the following KBAs for delivery split:

  • 3487497 - Central KBA for delivery split
  • 1461604 - Delivery Split Occurs
  • 355404 - Why was a delivery split during creation?
  • 546668 - FAQ: Delivery split when creating deliveries
  • 399912 - Split analysis activation during delivery creation

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP mobile start could not load external app for many...
entry.content:
Dear @sonikapoly1,
we are sorry to hear that you are facing an issue with SAP Mobile Start.

One thing you can try to resolve the issue is manually syncing the Content Provider from the SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Site Manager. This can be done with the following steps:

  1. Open the Site Manager of SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
  2. On the left-side menu, select the "Channel Manager"
  3. Locate the Content Channel / Content Provider from which the "Transfer Stock - In-Plant" app is coming from
  4. Click on the sync button on the right side under "Actions"
  5. Wait a short moment
  6. Force-close SAP Mobile Start and re-try

If you continue facing the issue, kindly open a support ticket. My colleague will help you to resolve the issue as soon as possible.

Kind regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Error message: Account XXX requires an account assign...
entry.content:
Hello @Api 

Your account is a cost element in CO. Thus you need to provide a CO object for it, e.g. a cost center or an internal order. You can do that either directly in the account assignment screen and put default CO object(s) in the OKB9 configuration.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Column Name is not updating in Report Export( Success...
entry.content:
Now Column name is updating in the exported report.

Followed KBA: 3413959 - How to change column names in Story - SAP for Me

Regards,

Satish Naik

entry.title: Re: Validation GL account with the cost center
entry.content: instead of BSEG-COST CENTER = 11111 or 22222, how can we do validation like Select Top 1 from bkpf where xblnr = bkpf-xblnr(bkpf-xblnr is value coming from user input screen)?

entry.title: Re: Problem with authorization objects in G/L account bal...
entry.content:
Hello Raymond,

thanks for your fast reply!

I get the following error:

K_PCA KSTAR * CO_ACTION 3027 RESPAREA PC *
K_PCA KSTAR * CO_ACTION 3027 RESPAREA PC0001*
K_PCA KSTAR * CO_ACTION 3027 RESPAREA PC* *
K_PCA RESPAREA * KSTAR * CO_ACTION 3027

So it wants a *, even though the specific PC and GL Account permissions are granted!

Reports like FAGLL03 work without a problem.

Any help is highly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Texts of Hierarchical Nodes not shown in Sap Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello maffio,

I struggled with the same problem a few weeks ago.

In my case, the dimension was time-dependent, but not the association to the hierarchy with directory.
The solution was to make the hierarchy and text associations time-dependent as well by adding DateTo and DateFrom to a calculation node.
After that the texts of both the leafs and the nodes were displayed.

Perhaps this solution will also work for you.


BR
Tony

entry.title: Re: Joule error in S4HC public when accessing SAC: No acc...
entry.content:
Hello @nageshcaparthy,

thanks a lot for your feedback. - UPDATE:

I checked the Blog (should have found it already last week) ... and it seems our login method is incorrect? ... you write: "Your SAP Analytics Cloud utilizes SAP Cloud Identity Services or SAML SSO, with your email address functioning as your login method" - We are using the SAML Attribute User ID.

And no, I have not raised a SAP ticket so far, since it is a TDD tenant, and I was not sure if our version was already capable or not ...

However, I'm missing the login in your Blog, about the SSO/SAML settings between SAC, IAM and S4HC/Joule... in more details.

How should we solve this issue, if we had some other systems on the same IDP, but in SAC we need Username as attribute? I think, we changed that from mail to User ID, since we used it together with the Marketing Cloud (and S4HC public TDD) and back in 2021 user login there was only possible via User name. Both launchpads did not have mail address as input field, but only user name.

UPDATE 2, I found this under item 10 - what does it mean for Joule login?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/3651184dad944aa2b361ad029a7a8cae.html?locale=en-US

If you are using a live connection to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Edition with OAuth 2.0 SAML Bearer Assertion, NameId must be identical to the user name of the business user on your SAP S/4HANA system.

For example, if you want to map an SAP Analytics Cloud user with the user ID SACUSER to your SAP S/4HANA Cloud user with the user name S4HANAUSER, you must select Custom SAML User Mapping and use S4HANAUSER as the Login Credential in Step 10.

If you are using SAP Cloud Identity as your SAML IdP, you can choose Login Name as the NameID attribute for SAP Analytics Cloud, then you can set the login name of your SAP Analytics Cloud user as S4HANAUSER.

Thanks and BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Error message: Account XXX requires an account assign...
entry.content:
Hi @Dominik,

thank you very much for your reply! What I don’t understand, however, when I create a Sales Order directly in the system -> create a Purchase Request -> create a Purchase Order and look into the Account Assignment, then there is no cost center maintained. Why is it not necessary then, but becomes necessary when migrating the open PO? That’s what confuses me…

entry.title: Re: Connect MySql DB to SAC Planning to extract data
entry.content:
With setup of Cloud connector and Cloud agent with JDBC adapter, SAC can import from MySQL DB via import connection. Please refer to help page here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0d5ffbb6951b45778c1a90ffd0114f04.html But import and export can be achieved via external application by calling the import and export API of SAC:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/14cac91febef464dbb1efce20e3f1613/fe6efb8aba9444c6a3ce21eef02bba62.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/14cac91febef464dbb1efce20e3f1613/db62fd76514b48f8b71d695360320f4a.html

entry.title: Re: automatic assignment of Support Team to incident in s...
entry.content:
This is now done via BRF+ integration.
If I'm not mistaken, the other ways of determining the support team are deprecated (including assignement via iBase)
Have a look at the action SMIN_STD_FIND_PARTNER_FDT

For further information see: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3518047800.html

 

Hope this helps

entry.title: Missing partner functions in the partner dropdown listbox
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When I do 'Define Partner Determination Procedure' configuration, I found the Partner Function '00000056

Service Employee Group' was missed in F4 dropdown list and couldn't be selected.

But in ‘Define Partner Functions’ 00000056 exists.

I checked with notes 716349, it was exactly same with my issue, but it hasn't provided any solution for it.

Thanks for your support!

Vincent

entry.title: Re: Web Client Extension Error 404 - React App with React Router
entry.content:
Request url is:

https://(domain)/webx/index.html#boEXTENSION-app?addonId=6077&appFolder=revents&index=1

On a local static serwer React App standalone works fine.

entry.title: Re: Can we disable "Training Overdue Send Reminder" Popup...
entry.content: Does anyone know where the 'Manager Reminder' permission is, as I'm unable to see it as we want it removed.

entry.title: Projected stock with IBP_CAGGR (current and future periods only)
entry.content:
Dear all,

I want to model projected stock balance with IBP_CAGGR function. What I'd like to achieve is to start the calculation from the current period and skip anything that lies in the past.

Since IBP_CAGGR requires PASTCURRENTFUTURE parameter @ REQUEST level, all past data will be considered. Using CURRENTFUTURE at @WKPRODLOC level won't change anything since Excel anyway picks @ REQUEST calculation

What is the way to achieve projected stock with current a future periods only?

Many thanks,

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Remove Quality stock from Available stock in MD04
entry.content:
Hi Mo_Lee,

Although I am not an expert on this subject please consider:

- Quality stock is normally seen as MRP-relevant as a system setting (I think you can not change this system setting in any customizing)

- In case you do not want Quality stock as relevant for MRP you could move it into a storage location which is customized as not MRP-relevant

- Quality stock is not seen as available during the release of a production order (availability check)

 

greetings, Herman

entry.title: Re: Integrating Open SQL Schema Tables with SAP Datasphere Space using Dataflow
entry.content:
Hello Mrinal,

great use case, but that can be done via SQL code.

Another point is that view persistency works with snapshots (if it fails we have the previos version available),

While dataflows works with batch of data, if it fails you have partial data on the target table.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Week number calculation depending from "date in...
entry.content:
Hi Adriano,

At the time of writing, I don't believe that SAP offer any direct API access to the value of a Story Current Date input control. There are a few ideas that 'might' work, like getDimensionFilters(), but the fine print indicates that 'Currently, they don't contain time range filters', so no luck with this approach.

However. If you have a model in your story with a date dimension, you can use a hidden table to expose the value of the Current Date Input Control.

1. Create a table in the story. It doesn't need to have any dimensions in the Rows or Columns, in fact you can also apply a filter to it so that it returns no data at all for load speed.

2. Apply a date range filter to the date dimension in the model. Configure it to use the date imput control, and set it to the granularity of 'Day'.

3. Create a Text widget and add a dynamic text token that refers to the date dimension you assigned the filter to:

This will now display the formatted date selected in the Input Control. The downside is that it is held as a string and you can't expose the key, but the string can still be parsed in a script.

4. Create a script variable in the story. I have used 'WeekNum' defined as an integer public script variable.

5. Add a script to the onResultChanged() event of your working table (Table_1 in my case).

// Get the selected date as a plain text string from the Text_1 widget (e.g. "May 9, 2025")
var seldate = Text_1.getPlainText();

// Parse the string into a timestamp (milliseconds since 1 Jan 1970)
// Note: Date.parse returns NaN if the input is not a valid date string
var selectedDate = Date.parse(seldate);

// Get the current time in milliseconds
var todayMs = Date.now();

// Calculate the absolute time difference in milliseconds
var diffMs = Math.abs(todayMs - selectedDate);

// Convert milliseconds to full weeks (1 week = 1000ms * 60s * 60m * 24h * 7d)
var weeksBetween = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 7));

// Store the result in a variable for use elsewhere
WeekNum = weeksBetween;

 6. Now that you have the elapsed weeks as an integer in a script variable, you can use this in, for example, a calculated measure:

Lastly, you can hide the working table and the text widget, just leaving the results as required.

If the date being a locale-based string is an issue, then an alternative is to get the date into the working table and then get it into the script using .getResultSet() on the table. To do this, you would need a model with a date dimension of granularity Day, and then turn on 'Unbooked' for the dimension. For getResultSet() to return data, you would also need to create a calculated measure that always returns data, so suggest just '1' in the calculation expression. This way, filtering the table by the date input control returns a single cell for the selected date and you can read the ID from this result.

Hope this helps.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Download / upload attachments Fiori DMS - wrong file...
entry.content:
Hi Arnd,

I your question and please check that the workstation application has maintained the mime-type for format *.XLSM which would be application/vnd.ms-excel.sheet.macroenabled.12.

Based on similar situations in the past please ensure that you have a workstation application for XLSM which has the correct mime-type maintained. This should be the same mime-type as visible in table SDOKMIME. In our internal system I can see the following configuration for it:

Se16
Table SDOKMIME

Extension

.xlsm -> application/vnd.ms-excel.sheet.macroenabled.12
.xlsx -> application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet

Please read also the information at https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sapdms/3363504677.html .

Also note that there is a different behavior with the apps which is due to the fact that only "Manage Documents" is a real Fiori app and the other two tiles are embedded transactions which use the SAPGUI for HTML (ITS) mode. For this the design is slightly different and information on trouble shooting can be found at

3520958            Webgui FSM and HTML Viewer: File downloaded without extension
2424875            ITS HTML Control and FSM: document display problems

The difference between "Manage Documents" (Fiori) and "Display Documents" (GUI for HTML) is that following coding call of function module 'CV120_DOC_CHECKOUT_VIEW' that does not happen in the Fiori app:

 

SAPLCV110                      / LCV110F32
FORM            / KPRO_FILE_DISPLAY

 

  IF gs_frontend-winsys = 'ITS'.
    ls_cout_def-content_provide = 'ITS'.
*    ls_cout_def-content_provide = 'WGUI'.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CV120_SPLIT_PATH'        "Note 3026896
      EXPORTING
        pf_path        = ls_phio-filename
     IMPORTING
       pfx_file       = ls_doc_file-filename. " Note 3026896
    CLEAR lf_check_file.
  ENDIF.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CV120_DOC_CHECKOUT_VIEW'
       EXPORTING: ps_cout_def   = ls_cout_def
                  pf_tcode      = gf_transaction
                  ps_doc_file   = ls_doc_file
                  ps_draw       = gs_draw
                  ps_phio       = ls_phio
                  ps_frontend   = gs_frontend
      IMPORTING:  pfx_file      = ls_doc_file-filename
                  pfx_url       = ls_doc_file-url
                  pfx_use_last  = lf_use_last
      TABLES:     pt_components = lt_components
      EXCEPTIONS: error         = 1
                  OTHERS        = 2.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    PERFORM sys_message_info. EXIT.
  ENDIF.

 

The function module is called here with the parameter values

LS_COUT_DEF-CONTENT_PROVIDE    ITS
GS_FRONTEND-WINSYS                    ITS

which is specifically telling the system that this is a WebGUI (SAP GUI for HTML) scenario and so it is also different to the pure SAP GUI for Windows scenario. 

Best regards,
Christoph

entry.title: Re: Introduction for tcode MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT
entry.content:
I found the solution to my problem: 

3589769 - MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT doesn't create records in the KNA1 table

Solution: Maintain texts for missing datasets in SM30: MDSE_SYNC_DSET.

There is no SPRO path for MDSE_SYNC_DSET and from IT perspective it is ridiculous that description texts have such an impact on functionality of MDS_LOAD_COCPIT... shame on you SAP 😄

entry.title: Re: Error message: Account XXX requires an account assign...
entry.content: That I can't know without looking into your system.

entry.title: Re: Fiori LaunchPad get error when launching
entry.content: Hi. Did you manage to solve that error?

entry.title: Re: Material-dependent delivery confirmation
entry.content: Thank you for your thoughts. I have to ask the team if dedicated Shipping Points are used! (Greenfield Project)

entry.title: Re: API to access the SAC custom current date story filter
entry.content: As far as I know, there is still no API to do this at time of writing, but I have found a work around which I have described here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/re-sac-week-number-calculation-depending-from-quot-date-in/qaq-p/14099806/comment-id/4913757#M4913757

entry.title: Re: Disable/Block/Closed Plants disable from MM Procurement flows
entry.content:
Hi Raoul,

one option would be to do a mass change for the materials for this site (MARC Segment) and set a "Material Status" defined with Purchasing Block for the materials.

entry.title: Re: PP Variable size item data - Recording actual dimensi...
entry.content:
Hello @arjuna_bandara , As per my understanding, you are using one dimension unit of measure related component. where you are adding the wire length without any standard formula during consumption, I would recommend to use  alternative item with manual proportion with item category as "L" or you can use assembly scrap in material master if it's always need few additional consumption 

Regards,

Prasath

entry.title: Re: SAP Workzone Local Entry Point plan availability
entry.content: You need to set the entitlement first:

entry.title: Re: how to add multiple Purchase groups for a start condi...
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a weak point of flexible workflow, there is 2 options:

- Create 100 OR conditions

- Implement the BadIs SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF and SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL, you can create your own start condition and check the Purchase group only one time.

https://blogs.sap.com/2020/06/07/purchase-order-flexible-workflow-add-customizing-workflow-start-condition-and-dynamic-identify-agent/

 

Best regards

 

JCD

entry.title: Re: Storage bin sorting
entry.content: could you please help to share the CSV file ?

entry.title: Handle persons leaving the organisation when provisioning with IPS
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

We are setting up provisioning from EntraID to IAS to S/4 onprem. 

When a person leaves the organisation, the useraccount might get deleted in EntraID. From audit perspective we do not want to delete the user in S/4 but lock it and assign a specific usergroup in SU01. 
I am trying to find out what the best way is to achieve this. 

I found this parameter ias.user.update.instead.delete which might be of help, but I only found a SAP help page on it and nothing else on Google, so my guess is, nobody is using it. 

 

How did other setup the handling of preventing users from being deleted in an S/4 backend when persons leave the organisation irt IPS provisioning?

Thanks for your time

Sander

SAP Cloud Identity Services SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED Error in VF04 tcode
entry.content:
Hi,

I am curious to know how you have solved this issue finally.

Looking forward for your reply.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: Hi syedijlalayub. Thank you very much for your detailed answer. We want to do a Java mapping in our PO (Netweaver 7.5 SP25). You wrote: "In a JavaMapping in SAP PI when you want to access KeyStoreManager you do it using Class SAPSecurityResources in com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade API found in PO by default." but in our PO we only have an empty folder called com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade without any jar file. Do you know where we can get com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade.jar in order to use the class SAPSecurityResources? Meanwhile we are trying to resolve it with your solution 🙂

entry.title: Re: How can I copy dimension members between private dimensions in 2 separate models
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

I haven't tried this exactly, but we are doing something similar, and I think you could adapt it to suit your purpose. What I would suggest is the following:

1. Create an export datasource off the first model. This is done in the 'Data Management' section of the model, where you look for the 'API Subscriptions' tab. You can click the '+' which will generate the OData endpoint for the model.

Select 'Fact Data' during creation of the endpoint, and you can also specify any selections that might be useful. Alternatively, you can configure a delta, which might also be useful for your situation, but I haven't tried that.

Once the endpoint is created, you can click 'View Details' and then you are able to copy the link which would look something like: https://xxx.ap10.hcs.cloud.sap/api/v1/dataexport/providers/sac/Cf7p31xvLdq8nZytgWbcm4ruo9/FactData?deltaid=first-b07ffa72-de9c-42ad-813a-c78f6faecc11

Now in admin for SAC, you need to configure a new OAuth Client in the 'App Integration' section of the platform Admin. This needs to be for API Access and enabling the 'Data Export Service'.

This will give you a client ID and secret. You can use these along with the Authorization URL, Token URL to create a new connection in SAC that points to your export service for the model:

You can now use this as a data source to create an Import Job to load data into your other model. Because you aren't using public dimensions, you can't load them directly, but you could load the facts into the model (using a specific Version that you don't allow access to) and then in the Job Settings for the import job, enable 'Update Local Dimensions with New Members'. This should create the new members for you in the private dimensions.

I hope this helps.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Date Issue in BAS
entry.content:
Hi @KhaingZinTun,

This issue is likely due to timezone conversion. In BAS, JavaScript converts the UTC date to your local time. Please, check this SAPUI5 doc on date formatting with UTC.

entry.title: Re: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/securi...
entry.content: I'll correct the above. Inside the folder, there's a file called com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade_api.jar, but it doesn't include the implementation of SAPSecurityResources class.

entry.title: SAP Workflow Management Business Rule's Rulesets Capability available in BPA?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Using SAP Workflow Management's Business Rules Capability, we've created project which contains rules (e.g. R1, R2, R3, R4, R5, etc), rulesets, etc. For each ruleset, we setup sequential execution of rules. In other words, a single rule is consumed by multiple rulesets, which is then used in multiple rule services. For example, ruleset1 contains R2, R4 and R5; ruleset2 contains R1, R2, R3 and R4. 

please advise whether the above ruleset capability can be found in SAP Build Process Automation. If no, is there any workaround. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA migration cockpit - Migration of customer with address independent communication
entry.content: Sybille, Pretty sure there is no field when populating the Supplier Address-Independant communications data. Are there any guides on how to extend the Supplier object using LTMOM?

entry.title: Re: RITA activation for GB and CZ Country Codes in S/4HAN...
entry.content:
Hello @Shrinivas 

thank you for reaching out in the SAP Community. 

You activate RITA in company code 5110 (company code country: GB) and assign the foreign registration CZ. However, this means that the tax code ZC should no longer be used. Once RITA is active, you will have the option to use the tax country CZ with all the tax codes available in procedure 0TXCZ for your postings in company code 5110.

For more information about RITA, please see SAP Help here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/baee0f4d00de4f1693be3f57fd49685a.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

Anja

entry.title: Re: About semantic tags
entry.content: Hello Jeremy :-), Thank you so much for your proactive and detailed response! Your reply was extremely comprehensive and has provided me with valuable guidance and support. Once again, I truly appreciate your help! Best regards,Yahaha

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA How to hide a field runtime at BP Tcode on basis of User
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Line-Level MRP Recommendations - SAPB1
entry.content:
Hi,

unfortunately you cannot change MRP handling to reflect your need. What you can do is use Procurement Confirmation Wizard instead, where you select documents (Sales Quotation, Sales Order or Production Order) for which procurement must be processed. This will create separate lines for each requirement and will write this information on document lines.

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: Auto Goods Issue in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Hi Manoel Costa,

entry.title: Re: Unable to set a connection from SAP Analytics Cloud t...
entry.content:
Hi Niccolò_Stapane,

I would suggest the following workaround: just add the Postgres 17 drivers and add an entry in the properties file. The properties file is read to identify individual drivers but SAC itself doesn't have any awareness of what is 'behind it'. If a new entry doesn't work you can add the Postgres 17 drivers as part of an existing entry, for instance Postgres 13.

Kind regards,
Martijn van Foeken | Interdobs

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hello @dylan-drummond 

Just wanted to give you a quick update. Still need to investigate and test this a bit, don't understand from release notes which change of the latest release led to this change. But.... drum roll ... drum roll.... 

With latest docker version 4.41.0 and Mac OS Version 15.4.1 the 2022 Image is coming up. 

Good news ;)! Bests Tom

entry.title: Re: Integration of QR Code Scanning in SAP Module Pool Using HTML Service
entry.content:
I have a problem related to ITS (SAP Internet Transaction Server), I am implementing a transaction via handheld with the ZEBRA MC330L brand using the ZEBRA ENTERPRISE BROWSER application version 5.0.0.13.

My problem is:

On ZEBRA ENTERPRISE BROWSER, the cursor cannot focus on the input field, so it is always touched using your hand to focus on the field.

Is there a solution related to this?

entry.title: Re: SAP Workzone Local Entry Point plan availability
entry.content: Hi Ryan, it's still not available on our side. The entitlement sources for the Global Account are "Base" and "Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP for partners". Is there still a restriction? Last week I had a call with a SAP colleague and was told that the feature is only available internally and the general availability date has not yet been set

entry.title: Non Standard Allocation in SAC
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to create non-standard allocation logic via Advanced formula step. Any suggestions on How we can configure this via advanced formula or standard allocation or mix of both. 

Existing mapping between source and driver account data

ITEM CODEDiver account
SL1000AAC1
SL3000AAC2
SL8000AAC3
SL1000AAC4

Input data

AUDITTRAILVERSIONTIMECOMPCODEACCOUNTCOSTCENTERITEM_CODECOLLECTIONCHANNEL COUNTRY BRAND GENDERPRODUCT Amount
DT01BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000#2####200.00

Driver based on existing mix %

AUDIT TRAILVERSIONTIMECOMP CODEACCOUNTCOSTCENTERITEM_CODECOLLECTIONCHANNEL COUNTRY BRAND GENDERPRODUCT AmountExisting mix  Driver%
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC1SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M101,000.000.25
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC4SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M20500.000.125
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC1SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M302,500.000.625
DT02BUDGET202412CC02AAC2SHOP1SL2000DM1M2USDM1M403,500.001

Output after applying Driver to input Data

FINAL RESULT             
AUDIT TRAILVERSIONTIMECOMP CODEACCOUNTCOSTCENTERITEM_CODECOLLECTIONCHANNEL COUNTRY BRAND GENDERPRODUCT Amount
DT03BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000DM1M2USDM1M1050
DT03BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000DM1M2USDM1M2025
DT03BUDGET202412CC01AAC5COSTC1SL1000DM1M2USDM1M30125
             200.00

entry.title: posting period - M7053
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have an issue with the posting periods in our test system. 

I uploaded stock with T /SCWM/ISU to EWM and checked the flag to not post stock to ERP. 
This step was successful and I can see the stock in T /SCWM/MON.

Now I want to use T /SCWM/ERP_STOCKCHECK to also post the stock in ERP. 
The system displays the error "M7035 - posting only in periods 2025/03 and 2025/02 in company code XXXX"

In transaction MMRV the current period is 2025/05. 
Yesterday however I moved the posting periods from 2024/08 to 2025/05 using T MMPV. In case this is may be important.

Any help is appreciated!

Thank you in advance,

Fabian

entry.title: Re: Manual Selection of Production version Not working
entry.content:
Hello @MO_Lee , Though you have set production version selection as manual you would also need to have BOM explosion as 2 Read with Newly Determined Explosion Date  in OPL8. Try this let me know.

Regards

Prasath

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: SAP Workzone Local Entry Point plan availability
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue. I’ve opened an issue in the examples repository (https://github.com/cap-js/incidents-app/issues/100), where the feature is documented. I also reported it via SAP Support (533997/2025).

entry.title: SAP Enable Now SAP Companion on Web - Guided Tour user input validation.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone. 

"We have successfully configured SAP Companion for Web in SAP Fiori to enable the creation of guided tour content. We are now working on configuring guided tour steps to validate user input against the expected step procedure.

We know that this feature is available in the practice mode in simulations. 
The 'Input Text' field in practice mode in simulations can be used to validate user input for a specific field or step."

The behavior is such that, during practice mode, it checks whether the user input matches the value specified in the 'Input Text' field. The below image shows the message if the user input is incorrect.

Question: Is it possible to validate user input within a Guided Tour in SAP Companion for Web as well? If so, could you provide a step-by-step procedure on how to configure this functionality?

Thanks in advance!

SAP Enable Now

entry.title: Re: Handle persons leaving the organisation when provisio...
entry.content:
Hi @Sgemert 

you will have to use IPS Transformation to sync Users from Entra to SAP Application Server ABAP and you will see below highlighted in screenshot having condition to set LOCK. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-provisioning/identity-provisioning/target-sap-application-server-abap

entry.title: How to troubleshoot when faced the error after task ANI of Data monitor in S/4HANA group reporting
entry.content:
Symptom

You execute the task for calculation of retained earnings (annual net income, ANI). The task log contains the Error/Warning message:

  • G00 103 ( "Retained earnings/annual net income differ in B/S and I/S for &1 (LC)" )
  • G00 104 ( "Retained earnings/annual net income differ in B/S and I/S for &1 (GC)" )

For example, "Retained earnings/ANI differ in B/S by 20.313.895,46- and I/S by 20.349.990,92- for PR01 (GC)   Message no. G00104"

Troubleshooting Approach

1. Check any missing notes under ANI component according to the version of customer system.
E.g.
3225409 - Show B/S and IS difference in message when error exist
3500669 - Group Currency Value Is Cleared during the Annual Net Income Calculation


2. Verify the selected financial statement (FS) items for both BS and PL with Tcode: CXE5 and table FINCS_FSIASSGMT
Default clearing FS item of BS is 317000, while PL is 799000; but some customer may change the default value in their solution. Therefore have to ensure what the exact FS Item is at first.

Tcode: CXE5 
spot the Item Role, for example, Item role S-ANI-BS from tab [ANI, B/S], likewise, under S-ANI-PL from second tab [ANI, I/S].

       

To determinate the accurate net income FS items. Have to search via table FINCS_FSIASSGMT by inputting the items Role acquired at Step1. in some cases, the selected FS item could be changed as per Fiscal Year/Period.

       

Also has below situation, no role maintained at all, but set net income FS Item directly at CXE5.

       


3. Check Local Currency key for the concerned Cons Unit with table FINCS_BUNIT_ATD;
Check Group Currency Key with Tcode: CXB1 through checking the given version.


4. Check Data of both BS and PL:
a. Export all of the B/S FS items from table FINCS_FSITEM with item type [AST + LEQ]
b. Delete the aforementioned selected FS item(317000) of BS type from the exported FS items at step a.
c. Run Tcode FINCS_TOT_LIST, and set search filters based on below condition:
all FS items (except 317000) + version + period + COA + CT indicator = BLANK + PL to 10
then leave the result there for future comparison with PL items.

Period: From Blank to Current period(as per customer reported, in my case, it is period 12)
FS items: Paste all of the FS item from step 3.b(except 317000).
CT indicator: 0 (note 3003971) have to use Green equal sign =
Posting level = From blank to 10

             

 

d. Export all of the P&L FS items from table FINCS_FSITEM with item type [INC + EXP]
e. Delete the aforementioned selected FS item(799000) of PL type from the exported FS items at step d.
f. Run Tcode FINCS_TOT_LIST, and set search filters based on below condition:
all FS item (except 799000) + version + period + COA + CT indicator = BLANK + PL to 10
then leave the result there for future comparison with BS items.


5. Conduct the comparison between the BS and PL, and locate the difference spot, various situations may happen depend on the scenarios.
In most cases, if LC=GC for the given Cons. Unit, follow the steps of KBA 3146025 - Group Reporting: Different amount in LC and GC with the same currency in reported (released) data, the difference could be fixed with the solution explained in the KBA . On some special cases, may only need to post one side entry to be balanced.

Case 1: LC and GC hold same amount at BS and PL respectively, however, not balanced between 2 sides(BS and PL)
After comparison, in this example, the imbalance amount 0.01 of FS item 999999 was identified.

       

       double click the record concerned, the detail would be presented as below format. 
       


 Case2: The other case that the LC amount in between are equal, but GC amount has difference, this is typical case applicable to the KBA 3146025

        

Case3: LC amount are equal at 2 sides, while the TC of the BS side is doubled due to the FS item 

In this article, we hope to share one common approach with you to help provide more precise and sophisticated steps to conduct the investigation when facing the message as described above.

 

 

 

SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting

entry.title: Date & time display according to user time zone (in document and change log display)
entry.content:
Description:

EN: Via transaction SU3, the SAP-users can configure the personal time zone but the configuration doesn´t take effect on all apps.

Some applications for sales documents aren´t considering the personal configuration of the user’s time zone but the system time zone regardless of whether the user has changed the personal time zone.

For international users is relevant to display the documents (sales orders, deliveries, etc.) with the corresponding local time zone. For Instance, on the log of changes document for sales orders, the system time isn´t being converted to the user time zone and causes confusion when analyzing or tracking events on sales documents chronologically. Some applications like the “document flow” convert it to user time but others like “changes document” not.

So, in case the user’s time zone is different to the system time zone, before displaying the dates and times should be converted.

The question would be, if SAP plans, in the short term, to provide a global solution to repair the wrong behaviour with the personal timezone or is a workaround available to be considered ?

Thanks in advance

Best Regards

Gaston

entry.title: Re: How to check if customer invoice is paid in ByD via O...
entry.content: Hi May thank you for your quick response!

entry.title: Re: How to add a Excel-File to an existing Dataset (UNION)
entry.content: I exported a table from SAP ERP containing warehouse data for April 2025. Using this data, I created a dataset and built a story to visualize it. Within the story, I also defined several calculated key figures that I would like to keep. Now, I would like to add the data for May 2025 to the existing dataset so that the story reflects a broader time range. One option would be to export a new table containing both April and May 2025 data. However, this would require me to create a new dataset and rebuild the entire story from scratch, including all calculated measures, which I’d prefer to avoid. Using an import connection is not an option in my case, so I’m looking for a way to extend the current dataset with the new data while preserving the existing story and its calculations.

entry.title: Re: ME32K/ME31K - Badi/ User exit
entry.content:
I know that the custom header fields are not present in the parameter E_CI_EKPO of EXIT_SAPMM06E_018.

E_CI_EKPO corresponds to the custom item fields.

Use the other exits called before EXIT_SAPMM06E_018 to keep the values of the header fields in memory (global variables).

entry.title: Bank account already exists issue
entry.content:
Customer requires to create bank account and assign it to multiple chart of accounts but system prompts error "bank account already exists".

 

I tried to assign multiple CoA eg. g/l A and g/l B to same bank account entry but system prompts error "G/L account type not supported in multiple house bank account linkages" (FCLM_BAM_MAINT859)

 

Please advise cause and solution or workarounds so customer can create bank accounts?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Bank account already exists issue
entry.content:
--Cause--

When the bank account must have multiple house bank accounts, then the bank reconciliation account cannot be assigned to these house bank accounts.

--Solution--

Use normal Balance Sheet G/L Accounts

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/186460fdc35a4b64a713da9bb00deb1e/5c1eb2ea64bb425abd373c98c96db0c1.html?locale=en-US&version=2502.500

 

Solution is given in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3492183

entry.title: Re: Include Header row in subsequent pages is not working...
entry.content: Hi @Tomas_Buryanek , Please find the Hierarchy.

entry.title: Re: Missing configuration items in Manage your solution

Hello Irene,

I have checked for both, and in the P system, they exist in the following paths, but in the Q there are no SSCUIs.

Best regards,

Marin

entry.title: SuccessFactors AI - AI-Assisted Successor Insights (Set up and hints)
entry.content:
Leveraging generative AI capabilities, succession planners can now gain insights into the successors that are nominated for a position or an incumbent.

In the Succession Org Chart or the Position Tile view, users can access the feature by selecting the Generate Insights button in the header of a position card. Note that this button is available only when the position or person has at least 1 but no more than 10 successors.

 

To get the AI-Assisted Successor Insights tool activated some small steps are needed.

1. Fullfill the pre-requisites: you have to have licenses for AI Units

2. Activate the function

With the AI Units you will find a new admin page in SuccessFactors where you can activate AI Scenarios (AI Service Administration). Grant the permissions to this page to your user to manage the AI Scenarios.

In this application (AI Service Administration) you have to activate Assisted Successor Insights. With this setting you have activated the function in overall.

3. Assign permissions to your users

To make sure users can use the function add the scenarios to the relevant permission roles.

With activation of AI functions we have a new RBP category available under user permissions -> AI Access

Select the "Assisted Successor Insights" permissions.

 

DONE 

Result:

You can find the insights by navigation to your succession org chart and by selecting a position with successors.

or via Position Tile view:

entry.title: SAP HANA Cockpit API CockpitUserCreate, with option "Allow an existing user to access the cockpit"
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working on automating user management in SAP HANA Cockpit 2.0 (SP17 Patch5) and I need to programmatically enable an existing HANA database user to access the cockpit — essentially the same as selecting "Allow an existing user to access the cockpit" when adding a user via the cockpit UI.

I've checked the SAP HANA Cockpit API documentation (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cockpit-api-post.html) but couldn’t find a clear example on how to achieve this via a REST API call.

My questions:

Which API endpoint should I use to enable an existing database user to access the cockpit?

If possible, could someone share a Python requests example?

Example of what I’m trying to do:

In the UI:

Create User → Click check box "Allow an existing user to access the cockpit" and select existing user name from drop down list.

Programmatically:

Call API CockpitUserCreate to assign the appropriate cockpit role collections to an existing HANA user.

Tools/Environment:

SAP HANA Cockpit 2.0 SP17 Patch5 on RedHat Linux 9.5

Python for scripting the API calls

Any pointers, example requests, or documentation references would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance 🙏

entry.title: Re: How to check if customer invoice is paid in ByD via O...
entry.content: Hi May thank you for your quick response! I tried to me and I still do not have any success. 2 more questions I have and I really appreciate your support. 1. If I watch the metadata I see the field BYD_P_CURDATE to be mandatory but I do not see it in your request, I am a bit confused how it is working like this. 2 Question is regarding the UUID from the company. From where do you get it? If I try with the same name which I choose in the Filter UI (generating report in BYD) it is not working. This is how I tried https://<URLBYD>.sap/sap/byd/odata/ana_businessanalytics_analytics.svc/RPFINGLAU08_Q0001QueryResults?$select=CGLACCT,CCINHUUID,CIM_OP_IT_STAT,TIM_OP_IT_STAT,CACC_DOC_UUID_C&$filter=(CCOMPANY_UUID eq 'XXX') and (PARA_SETOFBKS eq 'xxxx') and (BYD_P_CURDATE eq datetime'2025-05-12T00:00:00')&$format=json

entry.title: Re: How to configure roles to ensure segregation of dutie...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

When it comes to managing payments, it's important that no single person has control over the entire process. This reduces the risk of fraud and mistakes. So, you want to split responsibilities between different people that’s what segregation of duties is all about.

 

How to Set This Up in SAP

In S/4HANA Cloud, people get access through business roles, and each role is made up of business catalogs (which control access to apps and actions). You’ll need to create roles that match the tasks above.

1. Accounts Payable Clerk

  • Can enter and edit supplier invoices
  • Catalog needed: SAP_FIN_BC_AP_PROC_PC
  • What they can’t do: No access to payments

2. Payment Specialist

  • Can create payment proposals (suggest who to pay)
  • Catalog needed: SAP_FIN_BC_AP_PAY_PC
  • What they can’t do: No approvals, no payment execution

3. Payment Approver

  • Can review and approve payment proposals
  • Catalog needed: SAP_FIN_BC_AP_PAY_APV_PC
  • What they can’t do: Can’t create or execute payments

4. Treasurer or Finance Officer

  • Can execute payments (e.g. send to bank)
  • Catalog needed: SAP_FIN_BC_AP_PAY_PROC_PC
  • What they can’t do: Can’t approve or prepare proposals

 

How to Do It in the System

1. Go to the “Maintain Business Roles” app.

2. Create separate roles for each of the four profiles above.

3. Add the correct business catalogs.

4. Assign each role to the right users.

 

I hope those elements will answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Become an Early Adopter for Joule in SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: Mass Load / Upload of Condition Records for Purchasin...
entry.content:
Hello,

A potential solution is to use the "Mass Changes to Purchasing Info Records" Fiori app in offline mode. This app allows to download purchasing info records, make the necessary changes, including updates to price conditions in the "Pricing for Info Records" tab and then re-upload the modified file directly through the same app using the Upload button.

 

While this isn't a direct equivalent to the "Manage Prices – Sales" tile available on the sales side, it provides a practical workaround for mass updating purchasing condition records, such as discounts, surcharges, or freight charges.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Storage bin sorting
entry.content:
Hello @akashgavali_619 

You can upload bin sorting with /SCWM/SRTUP. The transaction accepts a CSV file; comma or semicolon separated. The file line is interpreted with the UPLOAD_FILE routine, in the /SCWM/TLAGPS_UPLOADF01 include:

      SPLIT <fs_line>
      AT lv_sep
      INTO
        ls_lagps-lgnum
        ls_lagps-lgpla
        ls_lagps-act_type
        ls_lagps-rank
        ls_lagps-aarea
        ls_lagps-lgtyp
        ls_lagps-lgber
        ls_lagps-aisle
        lv_lagps_srt_nr
        lv_aisle_s_distance
        lv_aisle_length
        ls_lagps-aisle_next
        lv_aisle_n_distance
        ls_lagps-dstgrp.

These are the fields you need to pass in the CSV file.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: how do you set up Time sheet and Time Recording profile together in time management?
Express document:Update was canceled while repacking in PRDI EWM
entry.content:

while repacking the product in PRDI , user getting the popup with Update was canceled -The error is “database access Table LIME/NSERIAL, operation I “.

this is the serialized product at inventory level .

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Personal Loan
entry.content:
Hello People,

Could you please help me with the following:

In SAP SuccessFactors EC - Advances/Loans, If an employee avails a personal loan, they must meet the following eligibility criteria:

1) 12 months should have passed from the last instalment of the previous loan granted to the employee for personal loan in order to apply for a new personal loan

2) Even if an employee settles a personal loan in the 9th month, they should remain ineligible for a new personal loan until the completion of 12 months.

Best Regards,

Sam SJ

entry.title: Re: Error message: Account XXX requires an account assign...
entry.content:
AFAIK Only sales order with consumption indicator(KZVBR) = 'E' can be used as cost object.

  • Is this the case, if not check the current indicator definition with Customizing Transaction OME9 
  • Is the error code KI235 ?

entry.title: Re: Forecasting with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Hi @Sebastian_Gesiarz sorry just noticed your comment. Indeed this was updated from day 1 - see mentionDecember 2022 update: the forecasting capability from a planning table cell won't be supported in the Optimized Story Experience.Source (SAP Documentation). Thanks for your comment! Kind regards, Antoine

entry.title: Re: Integrating Open SQL Schema Tables with SAP Datasphere Space using Dataflow
entry.content:
Hi @albertosimeoni 

Snapshotting data is the process of capturing and storing a static copy of data at a specific point in time. It preserved the history.To preserve a history you need to store it in a table.

While view persistency in SAP Datasphere allows you to cache or persist data temporarily, it only retains the current state of the data at the time of persistency. This means:

  • You cannot retrieve historical records after the underlying data changes.
  • Persisted views reflect only the latest version of data at the time of persisting— not previous states.

To truly preserve history, the data must be stored in physical tables at defined intervals.
Let’s say you're tracking employee compensation or inventory levels weekly:

  • W1: Week 1 data
  • W2: Week 2 data
  • W3: Week 3 data
  • W4: Current week

If you simply persist a view during Week 4, it will only store the W4 snapshot. You won’t be able to go back and analyze how things looked in W1, W2, or W3.

To enable "time travel"—or reviewing the data as it appeared in previous weeks—you must store each week’s snapshot. Hence, you can use Dataflows in context of Datasphere to store Snapshot.

entry.title: Re: Custom ABAP Report for Secure TMG Access: Multi-User Enabled
entry.content:
One big problem is that people can maintain the same lines at the same time. There's no lock object at line level. How do you handle this case?

I don't understand why your table editor is compared to the Table Maintenance Dialogs, as it doesn't match the classic features like inserting modifications in transport requests, customizing comparison and so on.

You might propose code which can be easily reused by people. What could be interesting is to find and replace the table name by another name, and that would make the program work immediately, then do cosmetic changes. Also, you are proposing code which is missing the includes, GUI status and so on.

Concerning the code, I would recommend to:

  • Use meaningful name (e.g. GT_ALV4, GT_ALV5 are meaningless)
  • Use directly CL_GUI_ALV_GRID instead of using REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY and GET_GLOBALS_FROM_SLVC_FULLSCR.
  • Replace subroutines (obsolete since 2009) with methods.
  • Handle function module exceptions.
  • Don't clear variables before ENDLOOP (just noise)
